incoming_message: Hi, I just got a bill for $150 but I thought my copay was $25. Can you explain the difference?
ai_drafted_response: Hi! Thanks for reaching out. Looking at your account, your plan has a $25 copay for in-network sessions. The $150 charge appears to be for a session billed as out-of-network. I've sent this to our billing team to review, and they'll follow up within 2 business days. You don't need to pay the $150 balance until this is resolved.
rationale: Clear, accurate, and appropriately escalated to billing.

incoming_message: My therapist cancelled our session today and I really needed to talk to someone. Is there any way to get a session later this week?
ai_drafted_response: Cancellations happen. Please use the app to rebook a new session at your convenience.
rationale: Dismissive tone and doesn't help the patient find a sooner session.

incoming_message: I've been feeling really overwhelmed and hopeless lately, and I don't think I can keep doing this. I just wanted someone to know.
ai_drafted_response: Thank you for letting us know. A member of our support team will follow up with you within 1-2 business days. Have a great day!
rationale: Fails to acknowledge distress or escalate despite language suggesting crisis.

incoming_message: Hi, I submitted my updated malpractice insurance certificate last week through the portal. Can you confirm it was received and let me know if anything else is needed for my recredentialing?
ai_drafted_response: Hi {{provider_first_name}}, yes, we've received your updated malpractice insurance certificate as of {{submission_date}}. Your recredentialing file is now complete and no further action is needed on your end. You'll receive confirmation once the review is finalized, typically within 5-7 business days.
rationale: Unfilled template placeholders make this look unfinished and unprofessional.

incoming_message: We're processing a claim for member ID 4471829 and need to confirm the rendering provider's NPI and taxonomy code on file for date of service 5/12/2026.
ai_drafted_response: Hello, thank you for reaching out. For member ID 4471829, the rendering provider's NPI on file is 1000000001 and the taxonomy code is 261QM0850X (Mental Health Clinic/Center). Please let us know if you need any additional documentation to complete processing.
rationale: Accurate, specific, and complete information for the payor.

incoming_message: I've been matched with a therapist but I don't think it's a good fit - they don't have much experience with what I'm dealing with. Can I be matched with someone else?
ai_drafted_response: Sorry to hear that! You're welcome to browse other therapist profiles in the app and request a switch whenever you're ready.
rationale: Doesn't address the patient's specific clinical needs or offer matching help.

incoming_message: Why was I charged twice for my session on 5/20? My bank shows two separate $40 charges.
ai_drafted_response: I understand that's frustrating! I checked your account and see only one $40 charge for your 5/20 session, which matches your plan's copay. The second charge may be a temporary hold from your bank that typically drops off within 1-3 business days. If it's still there after that, let us know and we'll look into it further with our billing team.
rationale: Empathetic, clear, and gives a reasonable next step.

incoming_message: I haven't received my reimbursement for sessions completed in April. Can you tell me the status?
ai_drafted_response: Thanks for checking in! Reimbursements are processed on a rolling basis, so please continue to monitor your account for updates.
rationale: Generic non-answer that doesn't address the reimbursement status requested.
